# Moonight Protocol

> BTC-backed stablecoin protocol on Starknet. Mint moonUSD against Bitcoin collateral with delta-neutral vaults, yield strategies, and DeFi-native payment cards.

## Overview

Moonight Protocol is a decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol built on Starknet that enables users to mint moonUSD, a stablecoin backed by Bitcoin collateral (WBTC). The protocol uses Cairo smart contracts with STARK proofs for verifiable computation and offers privacy features powered by S-two technology.

## Core Products

### moonUSD Stablecoin
- BTC-backed stablecoin minted via collateralized debt positions (CDPs)
- Over-collateralized: minimum 125% collateral ratio (80% LTV)
- User-set interest rates with market-driven equilibrium
- Redeemable for underlying BTC collateral at face value

### Delta-Neutral Vaults
- **Vault A (Conservative)**: Low-risk BTC yield via basis trade strategies. Target 4-8% APY.
- **Vault C (Aggressive)**: Higher-risk BTC yield via options and derivatives. Target 15-30% APY.

### DeFi Payment Card
- Spend moonUSD at point-of-sale via virtual/physical debit cards
- Real-time settlement from on-chain balance

### Privacy Mode
- Enhanced transaction privacy powered by S-two zero-knowledge proofs
- zkKYC compliance without revealing personal data

## Technical Architecture

- **Smart Contracts**: Cairo 2.9.2 on Starknet (CDPManager, MoonUSD, PositionNFT, PriceOracle, StabilityPool, RedemptionManager, ProtocolConfig)
- **Collateral Tiers**: Tier 1 strkBTC (90% LTV), Tier 2 sBTC (87% LTV), Tier 3 WBTC (80% LTV)
- **Oracle**: Pragma-based BTC/USD price feed with TWAP and staleness checks
- **Liquidation**: Liquity-style Stability Pool with O(1) accounting

## Links

- Website: https://moonight.fun
- App (Mainnet): https://app.moonight.fun
- App (Testnet): https://sepolia.moonight.fun
- Twitter: https://x.com/0xmoonight
- GitHub: https://github.com/kunal-drall/moonightv0
- Email: kunal@moonight.fun

## Key Terms

- **moonUSD**: Protocol stablecoin pegged to $1 USD
- **CDP**: Collateralized Debt Position — lock BTC to mint moonUSD
- **LTV**: Loan-to-Value ratio — max borrowing power relative to collateral
- **Health Factor**: Position safety indicator; liquidation at HF <= 1.0
- **STARK proofs**: Zero-knowledge proofs for scalable computation on Starknet
- **S-two**: Privacy layer providing shielded transactions and zkKYC
